{"id":1422601025,"question_id":345,"lang":"cpp","lang_name":"C++","time":"1 week, 2 days","timestamp":1728952879,"status":11,"status_display":"Wrong Answer","runtime":"N/A","url":"/submissions/detail/1422601025/","is_pending":"Not Pending","title":"Reverse Vowels of a String","memory":"N/A","code":"class Solution {\npublic:\n    string reverseVowels(string s) {\n        string vowels = \"aeiouAWIOU\";\n        string vowelString = \"\";\n        for(int i=0;i<s.length();i++) {\n            if(vowels.contains(s[i])) {\n                vowelString += s[i];\n            }\n        }\n        int j = vowelString.length()-1;\n        for(int i=0;i<s.length();i++) {\n            if(vowels.contains(s[i])) {\n                s[i] = vowelString[j--];\n            }\n        }\n        return s;\n    }\n};","compare_result":"","title_slug":"reverse-vowels-of-a-string","has_notes":false,"flag_type":1}
